allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\([s for s in d if s['available']], indent=1\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); a=[s for s in d if s['available']]; print\('available slots:',len\(a\)\); print\('first slot sessionDates:', a[0].get\('sessionDates'\) if a else None\)")
